name: Verify Security Rules Installed
description: On the first file write of a session, verify that all required always-on security steering files are present

then.prompt: Check once per session: verify that the following security steering files exist under .kiro/steering/: secrets-management.md, supply-chain-security.md, authentication-standards.md, logging-standards.md — each with 'inclusion: always' in their front-matter. If any are missing, warn the user and suggest running: kiro-security-check validate. If all are present, proceed without comment.
